title: FDE Talent Accelerator (Forward Deployed Pioneers — AI Talent Accelerator)
location: London (SilverTree office, embedded in portfolio companies)
must_haves: Knowledge of AI tools: Claude Code, N8N, Perplexity, emerging models (coachable, not expert-level)
Ability to build working automations and internal tools via AI-assisted coding platforms
Comfort with prompt engineering and agentic workflows
met_strengths: Directly builds with Claude Code and agentic workflows — matches the core AI-tooling requirement exactly (rare, strong signal)
Founding-era operator able to create operational impact embedded with leadership
hard_blockers_note: Soft seniority mismatch: explicitly a GRADUATE / early-career talent accelerator. Ryan is ~6.4 yrs (mid-level operator) — likely over-levelled for an entry programme, which could weigh against him. Domain is software/tech PE portfolio ops; the 'build automations/internal tools via AI-assisted coding' expectation leans more technical than his pure-marketing background, though his Claude Code work substantially covers it.
one_line_verdict: His Claude Code/agent-building is a near-perfect match for the program's AI-tooling bar, but it is pitched as a graduate scheme — seniority over-fit, not skills gap, is the main drag.
fetch_note: Listing live on LinkedIn (job 4398492744); bebee mirror now 410 Gone. Requirements confirmed via two WebSearch passes. SilverTree Equity = software/tech PE fund; 'Amplify' is its AI hub. No public per-role ATS application URL found beyond LinkedIn.
